subject: Can't access my account after password reset
description: I tried to log in several times but my password is rejected and now I am locked out.

subject: 2FA code never arrives
description: The two-factor authentication SMS never arrives so I cannot sign in to the dashboard.

subject: Login page keeps redirecting
description: After entering my password the login page loops back. This is blocking my whole team, please fix asap.

subject: Application crash on startup
description: The desktop app shows an error and crashes right after launch. This is critical for our workflow.

subject: Error 500 when saving a report
description: Saving any report returns an exception and the page shows a broken layout.

subject: Search results freeze the browser
description: Searching for long phrases makes the tab freeze, search has been not working since the last update.

subject: Production is down after the latest deploy
description: Our production is down with error pages since the latest update, this is critical for all users.

subject: Overcharged on my last invoice
description: My invoice shows a double charge for the same subscription period, please refund the difference.

subject: Payment declined but money withdrawn
description: The payment failed at checkout but my credit card was still charged. This is important, please help asap.

subject: How do I download old invoices
description: I need copies of past invoices for accounting, where can I find the billing history section?

subject: Please add dark mode
description: It would be nice to have a dark theme, just a suggestion for the roadmap.

subject: Feature request: export to Excel
description: Please add an enhancement that allows exporting dashboards to Excel files.

subject: Enhancement: bulk actions for tickets
description: Could you add a bulk edit enhancement so we can close many tickets at once? Just a suggestion.

subject: Reproducible defect in report totals
description: Steps to reproduce: open a report, add a filter, totals are wrong. Looks like a regression from v2.1.

subject: Regression: attachments fail to upload
description: Steps to reproduce: create a ticket, attach a PDF, the upload fails every time. Reproducible on two machines.

subject: Possible security issue with sessions
description: Sessions stay active after logout which looks like a security problem for our compliance team.

subject: Minor cosmetic issue in the footer
description: The footer alignment is slightly off on mobile, a minor cosmetic issue only.

subject: General question about onboarding
description: Where can I find the onboarding materials for new teammates joining next month?

subject: Feedback about your webinar, thanks!
description: Great session yesterday, sharing some general feedback and thanks from our team.

subject: Broken export button, blocking our reporting
description: The export button shows an error and nothing downloads, this is important and blocking our monthly reporting.
